system.description: The Space Marine may detect any poison or toxins by taste with a successful Challenging (+0) Awareness Test. He may also detect poisons or toxins by smell with a successful Hard (–20) Awareness Test. The Space Marine gains the Tracking Skill as a basic trained Skill, and may (at the GM's discretion) gain a +10 bonus to any Tracking Tests against an opponent he has tasted.
system.summary: Detect poisons by taste/smell, gain Tracking skill
